ecosystem.title: Comprehensive Data Security Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Datagaze offers seamless security solutions to protect your data and infrastructure.
ecosystem.desc: Software products developed by Datagaze are certified by Microsoft and Digicert.

feature1.title: EV-Code signing certificates from Microsoft and Digicert
feature1.description: Software products developed by Datagaze are certified by Microsoft and Digicert. This prevents the use of fake software or software from untrusted sources.

feature2.title: Security and Compliance Certificate from SUE 'Cybersecurity Center'
feature2.description: Datagaze products and services are certified by the State Unitary Enterprise 'Cybersecurity Center,' adhering to the legal requirements of the Republic of Uzbekistan.

feature3.title: Experts and consultants with many years of experience
feature3.description: All services are provided by highly qualified specialists with years of experience, ensuring the highest quality in both products and services.

impact_numbers.title: Our Impact in Numbers
impact_numbers.description: We collaborate with numerous large organizations to help them secure their data. Our solutions guarantee reliability and efficiency.

expert_insights.title: Stay Ahead with Expert Insights
expert_insights.description: Gain valuable perspectives on the latest trends in cybersecurity. Our team shares in-depth research, company news, and actionable insights to help you stay informed and secure.

article1.title: Another step into the global arena
article1.text: Last week was full of important events. Representatives of our company participated in the international technological forum 'Euroasia Techweek 2025' held in Istanbul on April 17–19 as part of the delegation of Uzbekistan.

tab1.title: Secure Your Sensitive Data with Advanced DLP Solutions
tab1.description: Protect your organization from internal threats and prevent data leaks with Datagaze's robust Data Loss Prevention (DLP) technology.

tab2.title: Comprehensive Threat Detection and Response with SIEM
tab2.description: Enhance your cybersecurity posture by identifying and responding to threats in real-time using Datagaze's powerful SIEM tools.

tab3.title: Streamlined Security Audits and Compliance Reporting
tab3.description: Generate comprehensive reports and ensure regulatory compliance seamlessly with Datagaze's advanced auditing features.

tab4.title: Comprehensive Staff Monitoring and Management System
tab4.description: Enhance your workforce efficiency by tracking activities, managing tasks, and responding to issues in real-time with our powerful staff management tools.

about_hero.title: Datagaze LLC is the first national company providing cybersecurity solutions for medium and large enterprises.
about_hero.description: Its first product, DLP (Data Loss Prevention), helps monitor and control access, protecting against internal cyber threats and preventing data leaks. Currently, DLP is installed on about 12,000 endpoints in Uzbekistan, and the company collaborates with more than 40 government agencies and private companies, ensuring the security of their corporate information.

partnership.title: In Partnership with Leading Organizations
partnership.description: We collaborate with numerous large organizations to help them secure their data. Our solutions guarantee reliability and efficiency.
partnership.legal_title: Registered as a Legal Entity in Uzbekistan
partnership.legal_desc: Officially recognized as a lawful business entity by the Republic of Uzbekistan, solidifying our legal and operational presence.
partnership.cert_desc: Our system has undergone rigorous testing and evaluation by the Cyber Security Center, earning a trusted certification for its security and reliability.
partnership.resident_desc: Proudly recognized as a resident of IT Park, granting us access to a leading environment for innovation and technological advancement.

technological.title: Ensuring Data Security. Driving Technological Progress.
technological.description: At Datagaze LLC, our primary goal is to provide reliable and modern cybersecurity solutions by ensuring data security. By applying innovations, we help our clients solve complex cybersecurity challenges and stay protected.
technological.quote: Our main goal is to be a reliable and long-term partner in the field of information security and cybersecurity, provide convenience to customers and constantly develop products and services. Give your security in good hands.

dlp.hero_desc: Datagaze DLP (Data Loss Prevention System) constantly monitors the flow of data exchanged on your network.
dlp.working_desc: No matter what your team is working on, our DLP system keeps every file, message, and document secure — everywhere your data goes.
dlp.controlled_desc: Monitor and manage secure communication pathways within your network.
dlp.ai_desc: Datagaze DLP (Data Loss Prevention System) constantly monitors the flow of data exchanged on your network.

siem.hero_desc: Datagaze SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) continuously monitors and analyzes security events across your network, detecting threats and anomalies in real time.

web_monitoring.name: Web Monitoring
web_monitoring.description: Track web traffic for suspicious activity.

email_monitoring.description: Log and alert on email security threats.

file_server_monitoring.name: File Server Monitoring
file_server_monitoring.description: Track file access and server logs.

incident_detection.name: Incident Detection
incident_detection.description: Alert on unusual events across systems.

staff.hero_desc: Datagaze Staff (Employee Activity and Worktime Tracking) continuously monitors and analyzes employee activities across your network, detecting threats and anomalies in real time.

attendances.description: Monitor daily employee attendance, check-in statuses, and reasons.

actions.name: Actions
actions.description: Track employee entries and exits through various access methods and gates.

visited_sites.name: Visited Sites
visited_sites.description: Track and monitor websites visited by users.

key_logs.name: Key Logs
key_logs.description: Track employee actions and search queries over time.

computer.name: Computer
computer.description: View the list of computers and monitor their current status.

visitors.name: Visitors
visitors.description: Track organization guests, visit times, and their hosts.

gates.name: Gates
gates.description: Manage access points and assign multiple devices to each gate.

devices.name: Devices
devices.description: Manage gate-attached devices, their details, and operation types.

reason_types.name: Reason Types
reason_types.description: Manage various reasons directly related to employee attendance.

work_schedules.name: Work Schedules
work_schedules.description: Create and manage specific work hours for departments or employees.

waff.hero_desc: Datagaze WAF (Web Application Firewall) protects your web applications and APIs from various cyber threats, ensuring constant availability and security.

service_page.hero_title: Complete Security Check: Protect Your System
service_page.hero_desc: Our audit not only identifies risks but also reinforces your defenses to keep your data safe from evolving threats.

privacy_policy.introduction_text: At Datagaze, we are deeply committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy and Policy page outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you engage with our website and services.
privacy_policy.collect_text: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, and other details relevant to our services. Additionally, we may automatically collect certain information when you visit our website, including your IP address, browser type, and browsing behavior.
privacy_policy.use_text: The information we collect is used to:
privacy_policy.use_bullet2: Communicate with you about your inquiries, requests, or transactions.
privacy_policy.use_bullet3: Personalize your experience on our website.
privacy_policy.use_bullet4: Ensure the security and integrity of our systems.
privacy_policy.use_bullet5: Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraudulent activities.
privacy_policy.security_text: Datagaze takes the security of your personal information seriously. We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits.
privacy_policy.sharing_text: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties, except as required by law or as necessary to provide our services. We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, as long as they agree to keep this information confidential.
privacy_policy.rights_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. If you wish to exercise these rights, please contact us at info@datagaze.uz.
privacy_policy.cookies_text: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and collect information about how you use our website. You can choose to disable cookies through your browser settings, but this may affect your ability to use certain features of our website.
privacy_policy.changes_text: Datagaze reserves the right to update this Privacy and Policy page at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and we encourage you to review it periodically.
privacy_policy.contact_text: If you have any questions or concerns about our Privacy and Policy, please contact us at info@datagaze.uz.
privacy_policy.summary_text: This content should provide a clear and comprehensive overview of your privacy practices while keeping the tone professional and user-friendly.
